# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processor
  labels:
    app: batch-processor
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processor
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: batch-processor-container
        image: your-repo/your-batch-image:latest # Replace with your actual image
        command: ["/bin/bash", "-c"]
        args: ["echo 'Starting batch processing job...'; sleep 30; echo 'Batch processing job completed.'; exit 0;"] # Replace with your actual command and args
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        imagePullPolicy: Always
      restartPolicy: Always
      serviceAccountName: default # Explicitly using default service account
      automountServiceAccountToken: false # Disables mounting the service account token for security, as it's not needed.
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60 # Give the container 60 seconds to shut down gracefully
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app: batch-processor
              topologyKey: "kubernetes.io/hostname"
